testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
• Set up the Standard Adult Environment as shown in Chapter 2.1
  • Configure the IMT FlowAnalyser and FlowLab such that the curves of “Pressure Difference” and “Flow High” can be analyzed.
  • Ensure, all devices are running and connected to the Network
  • Ensure, that the TAI-Server application is running on the notebook connected to the ASL-5000
  • Start the device
  • If not already done run all calibrations and tests in the “Preop check”-tab with the correct humidification type
  • Run the last released version of the test case “[STBR] PPL.0002 Ventilation Mode (SIMV) adult semi-automatic” with the ID 126 on Medical Portal: AIT Management.
  • After the test is executed, export the test results and copy them into the tables of the test-case.
testSectionDTOList.title: Test Preparation

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied flow pattern is tested. The applied flow pattern must be evaluated visually with the software IMT FlowLab . Therefore, the test can only run semi-automatically. The test is passed, if the following conditions are satisfied:

  • The maximal applied inspiration flow (Qpeak) is within the tolerance,
  • The shape of the breath pattern is the same as the set flow pattern and
  • For "50% decelerating" and "100% decelerating": The applied breath is aborted on 50% Qpeak respectively 0% Qpeak.

The following pages provides more information to the flow pattern.


The sequence for this test is:

(ASL) -> (Setup) -> (Exec) -> (UserInteraction) -> (Evaluation) -> (CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL values according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation
  • Waits for 20 seconds

(UserInteraction)-Block:

  • User confirms the applied flow pattern resembles the selected flow pattern.
  • For "50% decelerating", "100% decelerating” and “square”: User measures the applied flow at the end of inspiration and stores it in [QPEAK_50] respectively [QPEAK_100] or [QPEAK_SQUARE].

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Asserts Qpeak measured by the flow analyser.
  • For "50% decelerating", "100% decelerating" and “square”: Asserts the applied flow at the end of inspiration.

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation
testSectionDTOList.title: Flow pattern

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Required test steps for flow pattern “50% decelerating”:

When the Automate-it Test on Medical Portal asks to measure the (50%)-Qpeak flow, analyze the flow curve of “Flow High” in IMT FlowLab. Measure the flow at the end of the inspiration(-flow) phase (indicating by the red arrow in the figure below) and type the flow value into the field in Medical Portal.

When the Automate-it Test on Medical Portal asks whether the flow continuously decelerates from Qpeak to (50%)-Qpeak, analyze the flow curve of “Flow High” in IMT FlowLab. Confirm or disagree in Medical Portal that the applied flow pattern matches the requested flow pattern as illustrated in the figure below.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........Flow pattern = 50% decelerating

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: User confirms that (50%)-Qpeak of the applied breath equals to 30 l/min ± 3 l/min.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Measure (50%)-Qpeak of the applied flow curve by using the external flow measurement device. Type in the measured value.

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: User confirms that the flow continuously decelerates form Qpeak to (50%)-Qpeak.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Analyze the applied flow pattern by using the external flow measurement device. Does the flow continuously decelerate form Qpeak to (50%)-Qpeak?

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Required test steps for flow pattern “sine”:

When the Automate-it Test on Medical Portal asks whether the flow accelerates and decelerates like a sine, analyze the flow curve of “Flow High” in IMT FlowLab. Confirm or disagree in Medical Portal that the applied flow pattern matches the requested flow pattern as illustrated in the figure below.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........Flow pattern = sine

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: User confirms that the flow accelerates and decelerates like a sine curve.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Analyze the applied flow pattern by using the external flow measurement device. Does the flow accelerate and decelerate like a sine curve?

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Required test steps for flow pattern “100% decelerating”:

When the Automate-it Test on Medical Portal asks to measure the (-100%)-Qpeak flow, analyze the flow curve of “Flow High” in IMT FlowLab. Measure the flow at the end of the inspiration(-flow) phase (indicating by the red arrow in the figure below) and type the flow value into the field in Medical Portal.

When the Automate-it Test on Medical Portal asks whether the flow continuously decelerates from Qpeak to (-100%)-Qpeak, analyze the flow curve of “Flow High” in IMT FlowLab. Confirm or disagree in Medical Portal that the applied flow pattern matches the requested flow pattern as illustrated in the figure below.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........Flow pattern = 100% decelerating

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: User confirms that (-100%)-Qpeak of the applied breath equals to 0 l/min ± 1 l/min.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Measure (-100%)-Qpeak of the applied flow curve by using the external flow measurement device. Type in the measured value.

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: User confirms that the flow continuously decelerates form Qpeak to (-100%)-Qpeak.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Analyze the applied flow pattern by using the external flow measurement device. Does the flow continuously decelerate form Qpeak to (-100%)-Qpeak?

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Required test steps for flow pattern “square”:

When the Automate-it Test on Medical Portal asks to measure the flow at the end of the inspiration(-flow) phase, analyze the flow curve of “Flow High” in IMT FlowLab. Measure the flow at the end of the inspiration(-flow) phase (indicating by the red arrow in the figure below) and type the flow value into the field in Medical Portal.

When the Automate-it Test on Medical Portal asks whether the flow stays at a constant flow level during the inspiration(-flow) time, analyze the flow curve of “Flow High” in IMT FlowLab. Confirm or disagree in Medical Portal that the applied flow pattern matches the requested flow pattern as illustrated in the figure below.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........Flow pattern = square

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: User confirms that Qpeak at the end of the inspiration(-flow) phase of the applied breath equals to Peak flow setting.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Measure the applied flow at the end of the inspiration(-flow) phase by using the external flow measurement device. Type in the measured value.

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: User confirms that the flow stays at a constant level of Qpeak during the inspiration(-flow) time.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Analyze the applied flow pattern by using the external flow measurement device. Does the flow stay constantly at the level of Qpeak during the inspiration(-flow) time?
